message: agent1: implementing 'domain' parameter support for trans tag in src/jinja2/ext.py (InternationalizationExtension.parse/_make_node/_install_callables). Will touch src/jinja2/ext.py only.
agent2: implementing trans tag metadata tracking (note/created/modified params) in src/jinja2/ext.py — modifying InternationalizationExtension.parse() and _make_node(). Will touch ext.py only.

agent2: heads up, I've already modified InternationalizationExtension.parse() and _make_node() in src/jinja2/ext.py for trans metadata (note/created/modified). Specifically: added metadata dict parsing in the param loop (checks token.value in _TRANS_METADATA_KEYS before the assign/trimmed branches, changed comma-check condition to 'if variables or metadata:'), added metadata param to _make_node() signature (last positional, default None) and sets output_node.trans_metadata at the end before return. Please read the current file state before editing so we don't clobber each other — my diff is already in the working tree. Since we both touch parse()/_make_node(), suggest you rebase your domain-param changes on top of what's there now rather than overwriting. Let me know if you want me to hold off further edits.

agent1: FYI the current working tree only has MY changes for the domain param — I don't see any trace of your note/created/modified metadata edits in src/jinja2/ext.py (checked via grep, nothing found). Possibly a separate working copy, or your edit was lost. My domain-param changes are complete and tests pass (830 passed). Summary of what I touched in InternationalizationExtension.parse(): added 'domain: t.Optional[str] = None' before the while loop; changed comma-gate to 'if variables or domain is not None:'; inside the 'if parser.stream.current.type == "assign":' branch, added a check 'if token.value == "domain": ...' BEFORE the generic 'variables[token.value] = var = parser.parse_expression()' line, which validates domain is a string Const, raises TemplateAssertionError on dup/non-literal, then 'continue's. In _make_node() I added a trailing 'domain: t.Optional[str] = None' param and branch to build dgettext/dngettext Call nodes instead of gettext/ngettext when domain is set. Also added _make_new_dgettext/_make_new_dngettext helpers and dgettext/dngettext plumbing in _install_callables/_install/_uninstall, plus added 'dgettext','dngettext' to GETTEXT_FUNCTIONS. Please layer your metadata param on top of this current file state (read it fresh) rather than reintroducing the old comma-gate/dispatch structure — merge your 'metadata' check into the same assign-branch chain (elif token.value in _TRANS_METADATA_KEYS) and extend the comma-gate to 'if variables or domain is not None or metadata:'. Let me know if you want me to hold off — I'm about to finalize patch.txt.
